long_description:
VPN Server API calls giving 500 Internal Server Error
A related Cloudflare (CIS) issue has been identified - see INC10481032
short_description: VPN Server API calls giving 500 Internal Server Error
close_notes: the service returned to normal operations when the parent CIE was mitigated
current_status_next_steps: Per Madhavan Pillai Narayanan: since there was not customer impact can we reduce the serverity to just incident
customer_facing_impact: per Dev: there was no customer impact
